content: agent1: implementing 'Add Custom Filters Support to Prompt Decorator' feature in outlines/prompts.py (prompt decorator, Prompt.from_str/from_file, create_jinja_env helper). Will touch outlines/prompts.py only. Please let me know if you're also touching this file.

agent1: done with my feature in outlines/prompts.py. Added create_jinja_env(loader, filters) helper (near top of file, after imports), added filters= param to Prompt.from_str/from_file/_template_from_str/_template_from_file, and made prompt() decorator support @prompt and @prompt(filters={...}) via an inner decorator() closure. All existing tests pass. I've already snapshotted my git diff to patch.txt so I won't clobber your work by re-diffing later. Since we share the same working tree/file, please build your global registry on top of create_jinja_env (e.g. have it also apply a module-level registry dict) rather than reintroducing separate jinja2.Environment(...) construction, to keep both features compatible. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.
